model_output: Perfect! I found all 5 confirmed entries. Let me verify the exact values and compute the hash:

args.command:
cat << 'EOF' | python3 -c "import sys, hashlib; s = sys.stdin.read().strip(); print(hashlib.sha1(s.encode()).hexdigest())"
Riverstone=top-1|Storra=top-2|Tornmoor=top-3|Underholt=top-4|Vyport=top-5
EOF
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of sorted pipe-joined entity=value pairs
